programme.title: Dogs: The Untold Story: Stronger Together
programme.desc: Dogs have played in instrumental role in forging the modern relationship between dogs and humankind evolving from wild predators to pampered pets in the process.

programme.title: AKC National Championship Dog Show
programme.desc: Highlights from North America's largest dog show, the AKC National Championship Dog Show presented by Royal Canin from Orlando, Florida. The nation's premiere canine competition with over 5,000 dogs and more than 190 breeds compete.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl: Inside the Bowl: A Look Back at Puppy Bowl
programme.desc: We're recounting the greatest moments from all the furry-ious years of puppies at play.

programme.title: Dogs: The Untold Story: Wild Survivors
programme.desc: The ability of dogs to seek out and take down prey has been instrumental to our lasting friendship. Dogs are the ultimate workers, willing to do almost anything we ask of them, including working non-stop in any kind of weather or terrain.

programme.title: Dogs 101: Best Family Dogs
programme.desc: Meet the Golden Retriever, Great Dane, Cavalier King Charles Spaniel, Newfoundland, Labrador Retriever, and Bichon Frise.

programme.title: Dogs 101: Komondor, Irish Water Spaniel, Samoyed, Shiba Inu, Greyhound, Rat Terrier
programme.desc: Experts survey the top 50 breeds of dog for their behaviour, history and trivia.

programme.title: AKC National Championship Dog Show
programme.desc: Highlights from North America's largest dog show, the AKC National Championship Dog Show presented by Royal Canin from Orlando, Florida. The nation's premiere canine competition with over 5,000 dogs and more than 190 breeds compete.

programme.title: Dogs 101: French Bulldog, Poodle, Airedale, Chihuahua, Labrador
programme.desc: Find out if poodles can read and if Chihuahuas are related to foxes.

programme.title: Dogs 101: English Bulldog, Collie, Wire Fox Terrier, Cavalier King Charles Spaniel
programme.desc: Find out what type of dog befriended Darwin and Einstein. One pup earned more than a U.S. president, and another was banned from the streets of Rome. This episode profiles the Wire Fox Terrier, Collie, Cavalier King Charles Spaniel and more.

programme.title: River Monsters: Invisible Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade has hunted down freshwater killers for 30 years, but those waters are infested with darker, deadlier creatures: parasites.

programme.title: River Monsters: Death Down Under
programme.desc: When six men vanish in the remote waters of northern Australia, extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to the scene and embarks on one of his toughest investigations yet, taking on some of the deadliest animals on the planet in his search for a suspect.

programme.title: River Monsters: Razorhead
programme.desc: Jeremy investigates terrifying reports of a creature terrorizing the Florida Keys, a beast so violent that it slices through flesh and even breaks bones.

programme.title: River Monsters: Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy journeys to Nepal where rumours of a deadly man-eating catfish have surfaced, and tries to determine if the Goonch has returned, or if a new monster is on the loose.

programme.title: River Monsters: Africa's Deadliest
programme.desc: Jeremy returns to Africa's Okavango Delta to investigate a pack-hunting carnivore blamed for mauling the victims of a capsized boat. This time, he decides to put on his dive gear and offer himself as live bait in croc-infested waters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: After two men vanish from a remote lake in Malaysia, Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit. A trail of evidence leads Jeremy into an ancient rainforest, where an old adversary lies in wait.

programme.title: River Monsters: Alaska's Cold Water Killer
programme.desc: For years fishermen have been vanishing in Alaska's remote and unforgiving wilderness, their deaths unseen, their bodies never found. For freshwater detective Jeremy Wade, a recent fatal incident sends him on a search for possible suspects.

programme.title: River Monsters: Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic island in the Pacific, a fishing community is being terrorized by something in the water that's left behind a trail of bloodied victims. The only clue they have to the attacker's identity are the large puncture wounds it's left behind.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deep Sea Demon
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes in search of the real creature behind the enduring legend of the sea serpent -- starting with a violent attack in the English Channel and culminating in the dark depths of the Mediterranean Sea.

programme.title: River Monsters: Coral Reef Killer
programme.desc: When a snorkeler is impaled and killed by an unseen underwater assailant in the waters surrounding the tropical island of Sulawesi in Indonesia, Jeremy Wade travels to the remote islands to investigate a spate of similar attacks across the region.

programme.title: Martin: No Justice, No Peace
programme.desc: Martin gets a traffic ticket and turns it into a Federal case when he decides to fight it.

programme.title: Martin: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: When Martin's CD Walkman disappears, he accuses all of his good friends of taking it.

programme.title: First Wives Club: Pilot
programme.desc: A public breakup with her cheating music producer husband has singing superstar Hazel turning to her BFFs Ari and Bree for support. Feeling unfulfilled, the women vow to reclaim their lives: starting by releasing Hazel's new song themselves.

programme.title: First Wives Club: Plan B
programme.desc: A spending spree with Derek's money gets Hazel financially cut off. Ari agrees to be Hazel's lawyer, and is put in an awkward position when David accepts a donation from Derek. After trying therapy with Gary, Bree realizes she wants a divorce.

programme.title: First Wives Club: Diamonds Are Forever
programme.desc: Ari and David clash about Derek's growing involvement in David's campaign. Unable to track down Hazel's pre-nup, Ari, Hazel and Bree orchestrate a heist into Derek's penthouse to steal his copy of their pre-nup. Bree serves Gary with divorce papers.

programme.title: First Wives Club: Storytelling
programme.desc: Ari is pissed when a scandalous video of her daughter Megan is leaked. Bree faces the reality of life without Gary when he becomes less available. Hazel is forced to sell off her prized possessions to help with her financial situation.

programme.title: Bigger: Pilot
programme.desc: After Layne's bad-in-bed boyfriend proposes marriage, Layne, having doubts about the relationship, has a one-night stand with a bigger and definitely better option, Reggie. Tracey learns that being on a reality show does not guarantee media success.

programme.title: Bigger: Is Bigger Really Better?
programme.desc: Things get a little hectic for Layne as she tries to juggle Greg and Reggie, all while trying to hire a new employee. Veronica learns her nemesis, Shelley, is oneuppingher in real estate. Deon vies for a promotion at the accounting firm.

programme.title: Bigger: Smack My Ass Like You Mean It
programme.desc: Layne continues to struggle with her romantic triangle, while managing opposition about her interaction with the resident homeless man coming from her vintage store's white neighbors. Deon's promotion looks more in reach.

programme.title: Bigger: Thot That Counts
programme.desc: Deon and Vince bond on a guys' day with Greg while the ladies consult with Tracey about The Ballers Exes Show Reunion.

programme.title: Movie: The Best Man Holiday
programme.desc: Old rivalries and old flames are rekindled when a group of college friends reunite at Christmas, after 15 years.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part One)

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part Two)
programme.desc: With Gina out of his life, Martin reconsiders his decision to let her go to New York to move on with her life, and he sets out to win her back.

programme.title: Martin: Arms Are for Hugging
programme.desc: Martin and Gina admit that they are fighting and arguing too much, so they seek the help of a church Minister for counselling.

programme.title: Martin: Guard Your Grill
programme.desc: After winning a charity boxing match, Martin thinks he is as good a fighter as anyone. After Tommy Hearns makes advances towards Gina, Martin challenges the boxer to a 10-round grudge match.

programme.title: Martin: Yours, Mine and Ours
programme.desc: When the small screen TV in the apartment needs replacing, Martin is enticed into buying a big-screen TV, and uses the money from Martin and Gina's combined checking account to purchase it.

programme.title: Martin: I Don't Have the Heart
programme.desc: Pam starts dating an older, wealthy man who eventually asks her to marry him.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: One of Vivian's college students' grades start to slide when she starts dating Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Banks Shot

programme.title: The Parkers: Baby Girl
programme.desc: With Michael missing after the oil-rig fire, it falls to Kim to care for his daughter.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Send It to Viral

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Pony Up

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Failure to Launch

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Brother Dearest
programme.desc: When David's brother Michael puts James and David to the task of finding him a development opportunity, they are led to the famed house where the movie 'Mommie Dearest' was filmed. Flagg battles his control issues when he teams up with Bobby.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Hell or High Water

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Naked in the Backyard

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Gangsters and Guitars
programme.desc: Rick buys an old Mafia 1962 Lincoln Continental with 'suicide doors,' but the repair bills keep adding up and so does the tension between him and his old man. A guy brings in a billfold from 1857 that he found, and it is stuffed with Confederate money.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bumpy Ride
programme.desc: The guys have the chance to add a Grammy to their collection; Corey and Chumlee want to buy a rare mini Coca Cola cooler from the 1930's.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Striking a Chord
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with a rare 18th century book documenting the first laws of congress, but things change after discovering a possible connection to the Declaration of Independence.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Last Samurai
programme.desc: Corey buys a sword without getting a second opinion. Rick and the Old Man think he got ripped off, but Corey's convinced he got a deal.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Book 'Em Rick
programme.desc: One of the first books ever printed comes in the shop. Later, a sitar is brought into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bo Knows
programme.desc: Read between the lines with the Pawn Stars when an etching by Pablo Picasso traces into the shop. Then, Corey and Chumlee swing for the fences with a bat signed by legendary athlete Bo Jackson.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Purple Haze
programme.desc: A collection of Viking items are brought into the shop. Then, Rick checks out a Fender Stratocaster played in the studio by Jimi Hendrix.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hot Dam
programme.desc: Concert posters signed by Johnny Cash and Stevie Ray Vaughn arrive at the shop as well as original blue prints from the Hoover Dam.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Fender Bender
programme.desc: Get heroic with the Pawn Stars when a 1939 Superman doll flies into the shop. Will Rick save the day and make a deal or will it be his kryptonite? Then, Corey gets electrified when a 1952 Fender Telecaster guitar jams in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Gilded Pawn Age
programme.desc: Rick visits a Gilded Age train and contemplates its purchase. A classic Nintendo racing game drives into the shop. A phenomenal Superman and Batman print has the team intrigued.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawns Ahoy
programme.desc: Sail away with the Pawn Stars as a peg leg pistol hobbles its way into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Megawatt Money
programme.desc: Two signed David Carradine replica swords; first edition of T.S Eliot's 'Four Quartets'; a 1965 Battle of the Bulge board game; a 1920s radium crock.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: In the Presence of Greatness
programme.desc: A Batman utility belt toy from the 1960s is within Rick and Chum's grasp. An impeccable Mosrite electric guitar could be a sweet deal for the shop. Rick continues to search for 'The Object,' an item featured on the cover of Led Zeppelin's 'Presence.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Some Serious Coinage
programme.desc: A sale of the first American coin ever made has Rick thinking it was 'mint' to be, but at a serious cost. Corey and Chum envision a future for an antique 'Jetsons' cartoon lunchbox that is zooming across their counter. Rick gets ancient self-help.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Off the Grid
programme.desc: Rick explores a Funko Pop! Mystery Box, while Corey and Chumlee enlist Rick Dale to rescue their fire alarm system. Then, the Pawn Stars get on their motorcycles to ride to Oregon to spruce up Rick's ranch with some new equipment.

programme.title: American Pickers: Deuce Digging
programme.desc: The guys hit the alleys of small town Illinois where Mike bids on the rusty frame of the most famous hotrod of all time. The guys get unprecedented access to a family's dusty collection.

programme.title: Movie: Soylent Green

programme.title: Movie: Westworld
programme.desc: When a futuristic resort malfunctions, two vacationers find themselves pursued by gunmen.

programme.desc: A gangster rises to the top of the gambling racket.

programme.desc: A young gangster falls for a music student while being pursued by police.

programme.desc: An embezzler serves his time in prison and then expects to pick up his buried loot.

programme.title: Movie: The Private Lives of Elizabeth and Essex
programme.desc: The story of the power struggle and turbulent romance between Queen Elizabeth I and Robert Devereux, the Earl of Essex.

programme.title: Movie: Fort Apache
programme.desc: A bitter, resentful lieutenant insists on imposing rigid authority on Fort Apache.

programme.title: Movie: The Letter
programme.desc: A woman claims to have killed in self-defense, until a blackmailer turns up with incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Movie: Suspicion

programme.title: Movie: A Streetcar Named Desire
programme.desc: A fading southern belle tries to build a new life with her sister in New Orleans.

programme.title: Movie: Descendants
programme.desc: In the idyllic kingdom of Auradon, the possibilities of what happens after the 'happily ever after' unfolds as the sons and daughters of evil meet the children of goodness.

programme.title: Movie: Descendants 2
programme.desc: Uma, Ursula's daughter, stirs her pirate gang to break the barrier between the Isle of the Lost and Auradon and to finally unleash the imprisoned villains once and for all.

programme.title: Movie: Descendants 3
programme.desc: The teenage daughters and sons of villains return to the Isle of the Lost to recruit more teens to join them at Auradon Prep. However, when a barrier breach threatens the safety of Auradon, Mal decides to close the barrier for good.

programme.title: Movie: Zombies

programme.title: Raven's Home: Raven's Home: Remix
programme.desc: Booker sets out to land the starring role in the school's musical. Raven encourages him, however he needs Tess' help as the part involves basketball and rap, but he refuses her help because she's a girl.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Tidal Wave
programme.desc: Zuri helps Xander create a music video for his song 'Tidal Wave' in the hopes of turning him into a social media star.

programme.title: Jessie: New York, New Nanny
programme.desc: Jessie accepts a job as a nanny and moves in with the Ross family: Christina, a former supermodel turned business mogul; Morgan, a famous movie director; their four kids Emma, Ravi, Luke and Zuri and their beloved Asian water monitor lizard.

programme.title: Jessie: Used Karma
programme.desc: After Jessie accepts an invitation for lunch with Tony, the building's doorman, Emma offers Jessie unsolicited dating advice she has learned from her stash of teen magazines. Meanwhile, Ravi becomes the target of Luke's practical jokes.

programme.title: Jessie: The Talented Mr. Kipling
programme.desc: Despite being weary of Ravi's seven-foot Asian water monitor lizard, Jessie comes to the lizard's rescue after the head of the condo board attempts to ban him from the building. Meanwhile, Zuri brings home another imaginary friend.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Sweet 16-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Karen throws Maddie a curveball about the day she was born, and she and Liv realize planning their sweet 16 party together may be more complicated than expected.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Sleep-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv volunteers to supervise Parker's sleepover in hopes of reconnecting with him once she realizes just how much he's grown while she was away. Meanwhile, Maddie and Willow work on a school project, and Joey and Pete go on a road trip to Pastrami Palace.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Smells Like Camp Spirit
programme.desc: Emma and Xander lose the camp spirit stick, which curses the campers with bad luck. Meanwhile, Jorge and Tiffany try to teach Ravi how to swim.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Can You Hear Me Now
programme.desc: When Zuri secretly keeps her cell phone beyond the allotted amount of time, it prompts Hazel and Lou to conduct a camp-wide search. Knowing Zuri still has it, Emma is stuck between busting her sister and lying to her new BFF Lou.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Friending With the Enemy
programme.desc: Emma convinces Lou that they should make an effort to become friends with Hazel. Meanwhile, a TV producer gets Ravi, Zuri and Tiffany to help him hunt the legendary Kikiwaka monster.

programme.title: Jessie: Why Do Foils Fall in Love?
programme.desc: Jessie and Tony’s first anniversary is coming up, and Jessie’s gift to Tony is writing a song about how much he means to her, but she can’t find the right words to express how much he means to her.

programme.title: Jessie: Kids Don't Wanna Be Shunned
programme.desc: Emma is upset when her friends stand her up for the new girl in school. Meanwhile, Luke has Ravi help him with his project about India for their school's multicultural night.

programme.title: Jessie: Quitting Cold Koala
programme.desc: Luke decides that it's time to give up Kenny, his stuffed koala. He tries to spend one night without Kenny and gives him to Jessie to take care of. When Kenny is accidentally damaged overnight, Stuart performs emergency 'surgery' to put him together.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Take Your Dog to Work Day / Slumber Paw-ty
programme.desc: The pups lose an important part of Bob's presentation during Take Your Dog to Work Day. Bob, the pugs and Keia run out of popcorn at their first slumber party.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie
programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Campy Camper Day!/ Founder's Day Flounder!
programme.desc: While on a camping trip, Mickey, Donald and Daisy can't unplug from their electronic devices. Mickey and the gang celebrate the 100th birthday of Hot Dog Hills.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Croissant de Triomphe
Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Have Dance Face?
programme.desc: Cami and Delaware try out for the dance team, but when Cami discovers Delaware makes a goofy face when she's dancing, Cami worries that they won't make the team.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Just Dance?

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Ted Bundy

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Scott Peterson
programme.desc: When 8 months pregnant Laci Peterson went missing on Christmas Eve 2002, her disappearance became a shocking national story. Scott, convicted of her murder 15 years ago, now has grounds for an appeal.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Aileen Wuornos

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Drew Peterson

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Kristen Gilbert
programme.desc: Police believe nurse Kristen Gilbert may have committed up to 60 murders at a hospital in Massachusetts. Some say an affair drove Gilbert to murder while others think her narcissism caused the death of these innocent patients.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Bloody New Years

programme.title: Snapped: Dianna Saunders

programme.title: Snapped: Kathleen Dorsett
programme.desc: The case of a missing man uncovers a family willing to go to any lengths to get what they want.

programme.title: Snapped: Heather Horst
programme.desc: A young wife finds her husband dead, but police soon uncover a twisted web of lies and murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Sharon Maxwell

programme.title: Snapped: Denise Frei
programme.desc: The murder of a local café owner leads a small-town police force to uncover a diabolical scheme fueled by scandalous temptation.

programme.title: Snapped: Shajia Ayobi
programme.desc: A carjacking could have ties to international espionage; the murderer may turn out to be someone much closer to home.

programme.title: Snapped: Sonia Mitchell

programme.desc: Follow the Troopers on a sting operation as they storm the compound of a criminal suspected of hiding stolen guns. Elsewhere, Troopers engage in a tense standoff with a hostile man who beat up his girlfriend.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Doc Got Run Over by a Reindeer
programme.desc: In this enhanced episode, leaves turn the season to autumn in Michigan, but the crew at Pol Vet falls into the same busy routine!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: New Cats on the Block
programme.desc: The clinic is busy with poisoned pups, sassy cats, and new feline neighbours.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Nerves of Steer
programme.desc: Horses are driving Dr. Pol wild as he works to fix chunky runny noses, gruesome gashes and even penile problems.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Udderly Frozen
programme.desc: Vets, calves and cats are all having a hard time after getting the cold shoulder from Jack Frost this winter. Farmers, livestock and pets work to adapt while Dr. Pol stays warm the only way he knows how — by keeping busy.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Bugged Bunny
programme.desc: Dr. Pol juggles cases that send him out to help a horse combating colic, a rabbit that can’t hop and a working dog named Stitches, with possible head trauma.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Money Barks
programme.desc: The animals of Isabella County are getting antsy after such a long winter and they’re up to more trouble than usual.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Slop, Drop and Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol certainly has a lot on his plate when a pit-bull is in for emergency surgery, a pair of pups run into a prickly porcupine, and Smoke the pet pig is attacked.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: It's Raining Hen
programme.desc: Popeye the therapy rabbit comes into Pol Clinic with overgrown teeth but leaves with a couple of dates when his owner, Jodi, persuades Dr. Pol to donate dinner with himself and Diane for a fundraiser.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Chernobyl's Toughest Fix
programme.desc: The Chernobyl disaster created one of the world's deadliest places, and as the temporary fix around the damaged reactor begins to fail, engineers race to build a cutting-edge structure to contain the contamination that could threaten the world.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Dubai's Impossible Island
programme.desc: The man-made islands of Dubai are modern-day engineering marvels that turn the Arabian Sea into high-priced real estate, and today, a team of expert engineers use cutting-edge technology to build a brand-new city district where there was once only water.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: When Mountains Explode
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts using cutting-edge explosives to turn entire mountains into gravel-sized bits essential for construction, and their investigation reveals the high-powered, hi-tech process behind this dangerous work.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.desc: The man-made islands of Dubai are modern-day engineering marvels that turn the Arabian Sea into high-priced real estate, and today, a team of expert engineers use cutting-edge technology to build a brand-new city district where there was once only water.

programme.desc: The Chernobyl disaster created one of the world's deadliest places, and as the temporary fix around the damaged reactor begins to fail, engineers race to build a cutting-edge structure to contain the contamination that could threaten the world.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Curse of Flannan Lighthouse and Aleshenka: Russian Mummy
programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Planet 9
programme.desc: Scientists have discovered a mysterious ninth planet on the very edge of our solar system. Ten times the size of Earth, this strange world could have moons with extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strangest Alien Worlds
programme.desc: Discoveries of new planets have revealed countless worlds much stranger than Earth. Some of these strange worlds don't have stars, others are made out of diamonds.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Battle of the Dark Universe
programme.desc: Dark matter and dark energy compete for control of the cosmos; the winner will determine the fate of the universe. New discoveries might reveal which force will emerge victorious.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of the Moon
programme.desc: A look at the secrets hidden in our moon.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Spacetime
programme.desc: Spacetime, the secret structure that controls our universe, is a strange four-dimensional substance that controls time, light, and energy, and will also determine how our universe will end.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Uranus and Neptune: Rise of the Ice Giants
programme.desc: Uranus and Neptune are mysterious, icy worlds at the edge of our solar system, and new discoveries reveal that these strange planets might have helped start life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Cassini's Final Secrets
programme.desc: For twenty years, NASA's Cassini spacecraft revealed the strange secrets of Saturn until it vaporized in its atmosphere in a blaze of glory. Today its legacy lives on, as fresh data from the probe helps scientists make brand-new discoveries.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Jam Master Jay
programme.desc: Marcia Clark dives deep into the world of hip hop to search for the truth of what really happened to legendary DJ, Jam Master Jay. Marcia will navigate the twists and turns of numerous theories that surround the mysterious death of this icon.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Lester Street
programme.desc: Toney and his team respond to Memphis's worst mass murder in more than 15 years.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: Mother's Day/ Somebody Knows
programme.desc: Detectives hit the streets in search of a 48-year-old woman whose two grown daughters fear she is the victim of foul play.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Murder in Treme
programme.desc: In New Orleans, when a woman is slashed to death, the investigation into her murder leads Dets. Chuck Ward and Rob Barrere to a house of horrors, and they discover the killer may be someone they least expected.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: A History of Violence
programme.desc: When a young woman and her babies vanish, detectives learn that a second woman and her baby are missing too, and one man may be responsible for both disappearances.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Robert Blake
programme.desc: Marcia Clark attempts to uncover the truth behind the unsolved murder of actor Robert Blake's wife, Bonnie Lee Bakley. Determined to find Bakley’s killer, Marcia scrutinizes this twisted Hollywood tale to separate the facts from the fiction.

programme.title: American Justice: Murder on the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Kosta Fotopoulos, a member of the Greek community in Daytona, invents a club for killers, and convinces his lover to kill a drifter so she can join.

programme.title: American Justice: A Questionable Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Naramore was convicted of attempting to murder a 78-year-old terminally ill woman.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Brotherhood
programme.desc: The brother of a paramedic gets sucker-punched and a pair of best friends are in an accident together. A member of the team comforts a suicidal patient.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Police officers Robb and Bethany find themselves in an armed standoff with a suspect who has holed up in an apartment complex. Meanwhile, Fire Rescue team Mayville and Stokes must put out a trailer fire that threatens to incinerate the rest of the park.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Show Me the Money
programme.desc: Roly goes undercover to nab a top cocaine and heroin dealer, whose most recent crime involved shooting an officer.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Cartel City
programme.desc: The team's K-9 sniffs out a package with black tar heroin hidden inside a child's teddy bear.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Fifty Tons
programme.desc: A local casino's connection to a prostitution ring may give detectives the chance to hurt the cartels.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: A woman drives with 60 pounds of dope in her car trunk while her daughter sleeps in the backseat.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The New C
programme.desc: A new informant is willing to give up vital information about dealers in exchange for help with his legal troubles.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Sister Load
programme.desc: The seizure of 350 pounds of marijuana leads the unit to a similar sister load coming from Mexico.

programme.title: Crime 360: Gilpin Court Shooting
programme.desc: Jaime is called to a possible homicide; learned victim ran 100 yards before dying. The victim banged on a couple of doors crying for help before falling down and dying.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Campus Tragedy
programme.desc: John Walsh spotlights freshman who allegedly introduces a knife to a fistfight that claims a star college student's life. Later, Callahan Walsh looks for Thayne Smika, who, police believe, shoots his roommate in cold blood over back rent.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Crocodile Tears
programme.desc: Salvador Vaca Garcia tearfully appears on local news when his girlfriend disappears. John Walsh scrutinizes Vaca Garcia's story. Later, Callahan Walsh looks at Brian Keith Freeman who allegedly slits his fiancé's throat when their engagement falls apart.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: The Escape Artist
programme.desc: John Walsh tracks the story of convicted killer Glen Stark Chambers, who beat his young girlfriend to death and then escaped prison twice. Then, Callahan Walsh investigates how Jesus Salazar avoids capture after allegedly committing murder 20 years ago.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Daughter
programme.desc: John Walsh looks at whether Alicia Osibin may be responsible for her own mother's murder; Callahan speaks with Andrea, alleged victim of Frederick McLean's abuse, who is desperate for McLean's capture.

programme.title: Killer Bods: Blood, Sweat, and Tears
programme.desc: An ominous mystery grips a small, seaside town when the husband of a competitive bodybuilder abruptly disappears. Puzzling sightings, shocking revelations and bizarre deceptions eventually lead police to a grisly discovery where it's least expected.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: a dead man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness. But when the young victim's checkered past is uncovered, Kenda must wade through a laundry list of potential suspects to find the man's killer.

programme.title: Aileen Wuornos: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: America's first female serial killer wrote down her darkest secrets for her best friend while on Florida's death row. Now, for the first time, those secrets are revealed in detail as the written words of Aileen Wuornos tell us what really happened.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: a dead man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness. But when the young victim's checkered past is uncovered, Kenda must wade through a laundry list of potential suspects to find the man's killer.

programme.title: Aileen Wuornos: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: America's first female serial killer wrote down her darkest secrets for her best friend while on Florida's death row. Now, for the first time, those secrets are revealed in detail as the written words of Aileen Wuornos tell us what really happened.

programme.title: Killer Bods: Blood, Sweat, and Tears
programme.desc: An ominous mystery grips a small, seaside town when the husband of a competitive bodybuilder abruptly disappears. Puzzling sightings, shocking revelations and bizarre deceptions eventually lead police to a grisly discovery where it's least expected.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: A Murder She Wrote
programme.desc: An Iowa mother is hailed a hero when she shoots an intruder in her home. But as the case evolves, investigators learn things are far from what they seem. Detectives face off against a master manipulator hell-bent on revenge at any cost.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Tainted Love
programme.desc: In the fall of 1994, an elementary school principal is found tied to a tree outside Oklahoma City, launching a nationwide manhunt for Franklin Delano Floyd, and exposing a staggering, decades-long reign of terror and abuse.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Death Wish
programme.desc: A park ranger in Texas pulls over a suspicious truck filled with marijuana. The passenger flees deep into the desert, unleashing a manhunt that will unearth something far more sinister--and bizarre--than detectives could ever have imagined.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Home Sweet Hell
programme.desc: A suspicious gun store robbery in Maryland piques the interest of the ATF, and ignites an investigation into violence, arson, and murder. As detectives zero in on the suspect, they find themselves face-to-face with an unlikely killer.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Bloodlust
programme.desc: When an officer pulls over a reckless driver in a routine traffic stop, he unlocks the key to a series of murders. Investigators from various jurisdictions work in tandem to track a sadistic killer with a penchant for torture, robbery, and bloodlust.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Homicide on the Range
programme.desc: A suspicious disappearance in Virginia piques the interest of authorities, and ignites a multi-jurisdictional investigation. A routine inquiry into the missing man's finances exposes a heartless killer with a checkered past - and a penchant for violence.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Murder House
programme.desc: Westfield, New Jersey, an affluent suburb just outside the bustle of New York City, is home to picture-perfect homes and families alike. In 1971, in the grand home of John List and his family, a true monster hides behind the stately façade.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: While She Was Sleeping
programme.desc: When Denise and her husband, John, discover that someone has broken into their Allentown, Pennsylavania house, they think they know who did it. But one week after the break-in, Denise comes face to face with the intruder -- and she has no idea who he is.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Unexpected Company
programme.desc: Reggie and Carol Sumner live in Florida where the 61-year-old retirees have recently settled into a more relaxed lifestyle. But when they mysteriously go missing after a visit from a former neighbor, investigators have to wonder if they left on their own.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Come With Me
programme.desc: After a failed relationship, 22-year-old Jennifer Hitchcock thinks she may have finally found that special someone when she meets Maurice Mason. But as soon as Maurice moves in, she can't help but feel as though someone is watching her every move.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Reeling from the death of their mother, Annie and Jessica Andrews perform a séance to see if they can contact her spirit. Soon after, strange things start happening in the house.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Secret Rage
programme.desc: For 17-year-old Sarah Wisnosky, college is all about new experiences. So when she catches the eye of a flirty frat boy, she's happy to play along. But soon, she discovers he's hiding a dark secret. Can Sarah break things off before it's too late?

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Fire In the Sky
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we explore the myths behind extraterrestrial spacecraft and we learn the truth of two pioneering flights.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Saluting the Truth
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Murder at the Vatican
programme.desc: Explore four conspiracy theories relating to the Catholic Church. See if Pope John Paul I was poisoned or if the Church knew about Nazi war criminals fleeing to South America.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Smart Start: Update for the New Year

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: John and Tanya purchased a 171-year-old home after a contractor guaranteed it had been totally updated. They're concerned someone is going to fall through their family room floor. Mike and his kids step in and work to make the space safe again.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: House Sandwich
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house that’s flooding after two monster custom homes are built on either side. The homeowners want to blame the builders, but Mike reveals that the real solution lies closer to home.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Miami Flip: Mission Accomplished
programme.desc: Carolina's on the last leg of this renovation and is keen to get it on the market. She transforms the overgrown backyard into its very own slice of paradise. Last up, she guts out the 70's bathroom and replaces it with all new modern, sleek finishes.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restored: The 1890 Yellow Shingle-Style Victorian
programme.desc: Brett strips away strange remodels and restores the beauty and functionality to a 1890s Victorian.

programme.title: Restored: The 1955 Mid-century California Ranch
programme.desc: Brett opens up the floor plan of a 1950s mid-century ranch and makes the space more livable for a family of four while staying true to the original style.

programme.title: Restored: The Riverside Transitional Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a Craftsman bungalow for a woman who had started the project with her late husband, but never finished. The homeowner is overwhelmed when she sees the house finally returned to its original beauty.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Mission Revival Mansion
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a mother and her grown-up children restore their majestic 1913 Mission Revival mansion. He's elated when he realizes he can restore the original linoleum in the kitchen, but the homeowners may not open to the idea.

programme.title: Restored: 1918 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a young family with two small children restore their home after a failed attempt to restore it themselves. The house has been in the family for generations so Brett's eye for historical accuracy is much needed.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Yellow and Brown Mess
programme.desc: Nicole finds another house in an up and coming neighbourhood that needs her attention. Fighting the onset of colder weather, she must first tackle an exterior makeover, replacing the icky yellow and brown paint job.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Breaking the Woodwork Rules
programme.desc: Nicole begins work on the interior of the Case Ave house and is faced with a living and dining room full of gorgeous woodwork and original pocket doors that have been painted over the years.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Five-Star Foyer
programme.desc: Nicole takes the dark and dim front entryway and opens it up, removing soffits, repairing original stained glass windows, and hunting for salvaged parts to rebuild the fabulous staircase.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Sensational Second Floor
programme.desc: The bedrooms and bathroom on the second floor desperately need Nicole's attention. She must deal with water-damaged walls, old carpet and vinyl covering the hardwood, and a tiny, dirty bathroom that needs an updated shower.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Breakthrough
programme.desc: The Case Ave house is almost complete, and Nicole has saved the most difficult task for last - figuring out a functional layout for the cramped kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Powder Room Predicament
programme.desc: Nicole's next project is restoring a historic mansion in the Summit district of St. Paul. Unfortunately, some key rooms have been completely ripped apart, and her first task is to rebuild the gutted powder room from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Distressed Dining Room
programme.desc: Nicole turns her attention to taking the pink and gold kitsch out of the formal dining room. Restoring the floors, swapping out sconces and repairing the stained glass windows take the room out of the 1970s and back to 1904.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: In at the Deep End
programme.desc: Nicole cleans up the swimming pool and converts some garage space into a much needed changing room area. Tapping into the sewer line causes more mess than she bargained for, while Nicole also finds some time to take some swimming lessons.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East
programme.desc: Middle Eastern cuisine comes from more than ten countries, making it some of the most diverse and popular food on the planet.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On Wheels
programme.desc: Ditch the four walls, head outside, and get your fill of those portable powerhouses known as food trucks. Jeff Mauro gets happy about an angry lobster sandwich from the Happy Lobster Truck in Chicago.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cali Cookout
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets San Francisco-based chef Thomas McNaughton at a farm in Healdsburg, Calif., for a live-fire feast of epic proportions. They affix a whole pig to a metal cross to cook over hot coals for several hours.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Beef
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the tastiest beef dishes in restaurants across America from traditional Philly cheesesteaks and ribs to juicy steaks and entire steers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the seafood masterworks of the Hamptons. From delectable surf and turf to buttery lobster rolls, clam chowder to smoked bluefish pate, the Hamptons' dinner scene is sizzling.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Baja
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern dives in to the Mediterranean and seafood-heavy cuisine of Baja California, Mexico. From simple smoked tuna to crispy fish tacos, Caesar salad to zesty seafood cocktail hangover cures, Baja's cuisine is an international sensation.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cali Cookout
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets San Francisco-based chef Thomas McNaughton at a farm in Healdsburg, Calif., for a live-fire feast of epic proportions. They affix a whole pig to a metal cross to cook over hot coals for several hours.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Beef
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the tastiest beef dishes in restaurants across America from traditional Philly cheesesteaks and ribs to juicy steaks and entire steers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the seafood masterworks of the Hamptons. From delectable surf and turf to buttery lobster rolls, clam chowder to smoked bluefish pate, the Hamptons' dinner scene is sizzling.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.desc: Gekko’s pet, Lionel, becomes a huge monster wreaking havoc throughout the city. Catboy confesses to Owlette and Gekko that he has a cuddly toy.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moonfizzle Balls/ Soccer Ninjalinos
programme.desc: Catboy works a bit too fast to kick back Luna Girl’s moonfizzle balls. Owlette learns that being part of the team means coaching Catboy and Gekko to defeat Night Ninja.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Bunsen Knows All/ Doctor Fozzie
programme.desc: Bunsen is asked a question he doesn't know the answer to so he fibs and the lie grows out of control! While playing pretend hospital, Doctor Fozzie quickly gets too many patients.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Super Fabulous vs. Captain Icecube/ Piggy's Time Machine
programme.desc: When Piggy decides to be a superhero, she must learn to share the spotlight with Summer. Piggy accidentally sends the gang on a wild trip through time with a time machine!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo's and Rolly's Birthday / Electric Pugaloo
programme.desc: It's the pups' birthday! Bob learns to dance.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wheels of a Hero / Moonwolfy
programme.desc: Armadylan steals the PJ Masks' vehicles. Kevin turns full wolfy on a trip to the moon.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Lionel: Saurus/ Catboy's Cuddly
programme.desc: Gekko’s pet, Lionel, becomes a huge monster wreaking havoc throughout the city. Catboy confesses to Owlette and Gekko that he has a cuddly toy.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Boomerang/ Fetch That Fish
programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Mouseke-Calendar
programme.desc: When the wind blows way all the pages of Minnie's daily calendar, Mickey and pals help her put it back together again and keep all of her plans up to date.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Bubble Bath
programme.desc: When Pluto's bubble bath gets out of hand, Mickey and Pluto each get stuck in a Giant Bubble and start floating away from the Clubhouse.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Bunsen Knows All/ Doctor Fozzie
programme.desc: Bunsen is asked a question he doesn't know the answer to so he fibs and the lie grows out of control! While playing pretend hospital, Doctor Fozzie quickly gets too many patients.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Super Fabulous vs. Captain Icecube/ Piggy's Time Machine
programme.desc: When Piggy decides to be a superhero, she must learn to share the spotlight with Summer. Piggy accidentally sends the gang on a wild trip through time with a time machine!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Donald's Stinky Day/ The Hiking Honeybees
programme.desc: After accidentally rescuing a skunk, the little stinker refuses to leave Donald's side. The Happy Helpers guide a group of BeeBee Scouts through their forest hiking test.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Grandpa Beagle's Day Out
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: The Go-Getters
programme.desc: Detective Minnie, Secret Spy Daisy and Captain Clarabelle band together to form the Go-Getters in order to help stop a group of giant baby chicks who are running loose in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Thinking Cap
programme.desc: When Clarabelle Cow plans a fun scavenger hunt for the Clubhouse pals, Professor Von Drake lets Goofy borrow his new invention to help everyone figure out the clues.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Farm Fun-Fair!
programme.desc: Everyone wins a Blue Ribbon for participating in Mickey's Farm Fun-Fair.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Fishy Story
programme.desc: Mickey and crew journey to a waterfall to find Daisy's pet goldfish.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Show and Tell
programme.desc: Martian Mickey pays a visit to the Clubhouse pals and participates in a special show and tell presentation.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Camp Out
programme.desc: In order to earn Clubhouse Camp Out Badges Mickey and his pals pair up with a buddy.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Picnic
programme.desc: Minnie along with the help of her friends decides to organize the first picnic of many.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Giant Adventure
programme.desc: When Willie the Giant gets a stomach ache, Mickey's buddy Goofy embarks on a fairytale quest to retrieve a magical elixir that will make his friend feel better. Along the way, Goofy encounters some enchanting characters.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Mickey convinces his friends to search for a treasure because he believes there is one.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Garage Alone/ Camp Happy Helpers
programme.desc: When a thief is on the loose, Goofy and Pluto try to protect the garage. The Happy Helpers fill in as counselors for the day at a summer camp.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Going Upppppppppp!/ Gone Fishin'!
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang compete in the first Hot Dog Hills Hot Air Balloon Race.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Luck Charm/ Teed Off!
programme.desc: When Goofy credits his recent good luck to his Rubber Duck, Daisy decides borrow it.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Captain Rolly/ The Coolest Dogs in Town
programme.desc: Bob takes Bingo and Rolly to a 'Captain Dog!' event where the pugs get to be heroes for a day. The pups try to find ways to keep Bob cool on a hot summer day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Close Encounters of a Pug Kind/ History Mystery
programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Quest/ Llama Drama
programme.desc: Goofy and Donald team up with Uncle Goof to treasure hunt in Peru. The Happy Helpers discover the only way to deliver a package is to travel by llama up a mountain!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goofy Gas/ Little Big Ape
programme.desc: When Goofy invents a new fuel to make the roadsters go faster, they wind up with unexpected results. The Happy Helpers try to capture a gorilla that is loose in Clarabelle's house.

programme.title: The Rocketeer: Downhill Derby/ Flight Class Heroes
programme.desc: Kit and Tesh plan to compete in Hughesville's Downhilll Derby, but a young inventor has a villainous plan to win! Kit's class takes a trip to see an automatic, pilot-less plane.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Supersonic Owlette/ Catboy and the Sticky Splat Slingshot
programme.desc: Romeo sneaks into PJ Masks HQ and discovers its super-secret rocket ship ability. Catboy learns that it’s not about how cool you look saving the day, just so long as you save it.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy and the Great Birthday Cake Rescue/ Gekko and the Snore-O-Sauras
programme.desc: It's Gekko's birthday and he's excited for his lizard themed party until Night Ninja steals everything. Luna Girl turns a sleep-walking Cameron into her very own puppet.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys
programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: The Missing Agent
programme.desc: Kaz, Yeager and Synara trace a distress call to a planet where a Resistance agent has gone missing.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Breakout
programme.desc: Kaz and Norath try to help their friends while being pursued by a deadly bounty hunter.

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Deal/ Forbidden Feline
programme.desc: Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Valentine's Dance/ Green Streets
programme.desc: At the Valentine’s Dance, Cricket develops an unwanted crush on Gabriella.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.

programme.title: The Moment With Laura Rutledge: Tennessee
The Moment With Laura Rutledge: Alabama
SEC Storied: The Book of Manning
programme.desc: Written into the pages of football folklore is the Manning legend, a story started by patriarch, Archie, with chapters featuring his sons, Cooper, Peyton and Eli. Director Rory Karpf explores how a tragedy shaped the course of their lives.

programme.title: SEC Storied: In Search of Derrick Thomas
programme.desc: Derrick Thomas was a legendary college pass rusher and talented linebacker in the NFL before an accident at 33 years old took his life. See how his legacy continues to influence the world years later.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Miracles on the Plains
programme.desc: Look back at the 2013 Auburn football season and their remarkable turnaround from the lowest of lows to a national championship game.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Believer
programme.desc: This profile of Steve Spurrier looks at his close ties to the SEC as a young fan, a Heisman Trophy winning quarterback and an accomplished coach.

programme.desc: Coach Sylvester Croom has overcome significant obstacles to impact many lives.

programme.title: Movie: Her Smell
programme.desc: The lead singer of a formerly-popular punk band struggles with sobriety and mental health.

programme.title: Movie: It's Kind of a Funny Story
programme.desc: After checking himself into an adult psychiatric ward, a clinically depressed teenager gets a fresh start.

programme.title: Movie: Stay Alive
programme.desc: A group of teens discover that the horror video game in their possession is more realistic than they thought, when members of the group begin to die in the same brutal manner they did in the game.

programme.title: Movie: Green Lantern

programme.title: Movie: Boy Erased

programme.title: Movie: Wet Hot American Summer

programme.title: Movie: Sense and Sensibility

programme.title: Movie: Little Women
programme.desc: A mother and her four daughters must learn to cope on their own when the man of the house leaves to fight in the Civil War.

programme.title: Movie: On the Basis of Sex

programme.title: Movie: Five Feet Apart
