programme.title: Movie: I Feel Pretty

programme.desc: Sam and Dean pose as Park Rangers to help a brother and sister search for their lost sibling, who the brothers believe may have been taken by a Wendigo.

programme.title: Supernatural: Dead in the Water

programme.title: Supernatural: Phantom Traveler
programme.desc: Sam and Dean exorcise the Phantom Traveller spirit from a man who caused a plane crash.

programme.title: Bones: The Yanks in the U.K.
programme.desc: While in London, Brennan and Booth are asked for their expertise on a case involving a murdered British Heiress. When a member of the U.K.'s team is murdered, Brennan and Booth's resolve to solve the case is strengthened.

programme.title: Bones: The Man in the Outhouse
programme.desc: When a body is found and identified as the host of a reality show that catches infidelity in the act, Brennan and Booth must identify the killer from a large pool of suspects. Meanwhile, Booth learns that Brennan is juggling two relationships.

programme.title: Movie: The Princess Bride
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman must be rescued from her cruel fiancé by her one true love.

programme.title: Movie: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
programme.desc: A young boy mistakenly takes the wrong plane when his family goes on Christmas vacation and ends up in New York City, fending off suspicious hotel staff, a kindly bird woman in disguise and two burglars he fought against last Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Three parapsychologists open a ghost removal business in New York City, but soon find that they may be up against something far worse.

programme.title: Martin: Baby, It's You

programme.title: Martin: Workin' Day and Night
programme.desc: Stan, Tommy and Cole convince Martin that Gina controls his life. To prove them wrong, he starts working double shifts at the radio station, which is exactly what Gina didn't want.

programme.title: Martin: Control
programme.desc: When Gina accidentally throws out Martin's basketball tickets, she tries to get replacement tickets from Sheneneh.

programme.title: Martin: You've Got a Friend

programme.title: Martin: To Kill a Talking Bird
programme.desc: An accident happens when Martin and Gina are caring for Mama Payne's beloved parrot.

programme.title: Martin: Fat Like Dat
programme.desc: When Gina convinces Martin that he's gaining weight, he and the guys take dieting and exercise to the extreme.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Blood Is Thicker Than Mud
programme.desc: Will and Carlton are given humiliating jobs as part of their initiation into a fraternity.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Fresh Prince After Dark
programme.desc: When Hilary is invited to pose for Playboy, Will and Carlton get to meet Hugh Hefner.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Home Is Where the Heart Attack Is
programme.desc: Trying to lose weight, Philip has a heart attack after eating a cheeseburger 'treat.'

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Take My Cousin - Please
programme.desc: Will hopes to improve his falling grades by introducing his professor to Hilary.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: You've Got to Be a Football Hero
programme.desc: Will is challenged to a drinking contest and gets trapped in a mausoleum with four ghosts.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Sleepless in Bel-Air
programme.desc: Will and Carlton try to concentrate on their schoolwork while surrounded by distractions.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Who's the Boss
programme.desc: Will quits when Carlton becomes the new manager of the students' campus restaurant.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I Know Why the Caged Bird Screams
programme.desc: Will and Jazz steal a statue from a rival school, who in turn kidnaps Carlton.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: When You Hit Upon a Star
programme.desc: Will's love affair with a musician is threatened when she meets her handsome ex-lover.

programme.title: Movie: ATL
programme.desc: Friends face different challenges as they prepare for life after high school.

programme.title: Movie: Baby Boy
programme.desc: After living too long at home with his mother, an unemployed young black man finally accepts his responsibilities as a man and a father when he is faced with adversity.

programme.title: Movie: A Gift to Remember
programme.desc: An accident between a sweet bookshop worker and a handsome stranger leaves him without his memory.

programme.title: Movie: Hallmark Hall of Fame: A Christmas Love Story
programme.desc: A youth-choir director is tasked with writing the title song for her Christmas Eve show but becomes distracted when a gifted boy joins the choir. Unbeknownst to her, this boy does not tell his widowed father of his plans to sing in the service.

programme.title: Movie: 12 Gifts of Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is hired to become a personal shopper for an uptight, corporate executive. As they work together, she teaches him that Christmas has less to do with the money that is spent, and more to do with the people in your life.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Christmas
programme.desc: Nicknamed 'Miss Christmas,' the official tree finder for the Radcliffee tree lighting, is left desperate to find the perfect tree. A letter sends her to a small town and a man who doesn't want to part with this tree.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cure
programme.desc: An emergency room doctor returns home for Christmas and reunites with old friends and family and is asked to take over her dad's old practice. The doctor must now choose between a new life and an old one.

programme.title: Movie: A Dream of Christmas
programme.desc: A restless young married woman is granted a wish by a Christmas Angel to be single again. She soon realizes that her new life isn't what she bargained for and embarks on a quest to win her husband back.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Graceland
programme.desc: A woman brings her kids with her on a business trip to Memphis so they can go to Graceland. While there, she bumps into an old flame from her singing days in college. Together they make beautiful holiday music.

programme.title: Movie: A Cookie Cutter Christmas
programme.desc: Two long-time rival school teachers duke it out during the holidays in a bake-off. With both determined to win the prize, their competitiveness could jeopardize what matters most this Christmas season.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Connection
programme.desc: A flight attendant is asked to stay for Christmas by a family after she returns a package left on a plane by a passenger and misses her connection back home.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actor Brennan Elliott from the Hallmark Movies and Mysteries original 'Crossword Mysteries: Abracadaver' stops by. Then, Ali Landry whips up a healthy chia pudding and morning green juice.

programme.title: Movie: A Crown for Christmas
programme.desc: After getting fired from her job at a ritzy NYC hotel, a woman accepts a job as a governess to a young girl. She finds herself attracted to the girl’s father, who is king of the country, and love reigns over the kingdom.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Getaway
programme.desc: A recently single travel writer is forced to share a cabin due to a mix up on her holiday vacation. What is an annoyance at first quickly changes to a new romance.

programme.desc: After his marriage to Aaliyah is annulled, R. Kelly continues to soar on top of the charts. A talented choreographer becomes the new Mrs. Kelly in a secret ceremony.

programme.desc: As journalists uncover a trail of lawsuits and confidential settlements concerning underage girls, an underground sex tape emerges that puts R. Kelly in a compromising position.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Wojcik Family
programme.desc: The Wojcik family's home continues to undergo much needed renovations.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: Toni Braxton
programme.desc: The story of Braxton's childhood, meteoric rise to fame, financial and health struggles and ultimate triumph over adversity, featuring interviews with Toni Braxton and her family, L.A. Reid Babyface, David Foster, and Diane Warren.

programme.title: Movie: Toni Braxton: Unbreak My Heart
programme.desc: Follow the singer’s journey from her discovery to her battle with Lupus, how she made it through her public divorce and dealt with her son’s autism and family struggles. The film chronicles the measures she took to make herself and her family whole again.

programme.title: Movie: Just Wright
programme.desc: A physical therapist falls for the basketball player she is helping recover from an injury.

programme.title: Movie: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: A male FBI agent goes undercover as an oversized, irritable grandmother named Big Momma.

programme.title: Movie: Diary of a Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: Helen McCarter has everything going for her, until her wealthy husband admits to having an affair and throws her out of the house. A distraught Helen turns to her family as she learns to stand up on her own two feet.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Burning Betrayal

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: When Rhoni Reuter, the pregnant girlfriend of Chicago Bears legend Shaun Gayle, is shot to death in her home, investigators are faced with a long list of romantic rivals as suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Deconstructed: Missouri Flood Zone Move
programme.desc: The Raneys remember one of the most challenging rescues of their lives where they built a dam and planned an entire cabin move for a Missouri family in a flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Deconstructed: Testing the Dam
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty remember when they moved an entire cabin into a flood zone all in the name of testing a new dam.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Deconstructed: Hydropower to the People
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty recall the time they embarked on an ambitious off-grid hydropower system after Tennessee storms take out a homestead's power source.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Deconstructed: Fast Action on the Homestead
programme.desc: The Raneys remember the time their own homestead fell into disrepair, requiring fast action to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Crisis Calls
programme.desc: In Alaska, the Raneys turn a homestead on the verge of going up in flames into a golden opportunity. Later they race to Louisiana to protect a family under threat of vicious storms, black mold and feral hogs.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Savage Wilderness
programme.desc: The Raneys explore their most epic rescues, counting down to the five most hostile and dangerous states that present the most grueling challenges for new homesteaders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Ozark Mountain Misery
programme.desc: The Raney family goes to the Ozarks, where Marty spent his childhood homesteading, and discovers a malnourished couple and a mouldy cabin that's making them sick. Massive electric storms hit, but the homestead must be built before Mother Nature wins.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Crisis Calls
programme.desc: In Alaska, the Raneys turn a homestead on the verge of going up in flames into a golden opportunity. Later they race to Louisiana to protect a family under threat of vicious storms, black mold and feral hogs.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Savage Wilderness
programme.desc: The Raneys explore their most epic rescues, counting down to the five most hostile and dangerous states that present the most grueling challenges for new homesteaders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Wolves at the Door
programme.desc: Poisoned well water and a mystery predator plague an Arizona homestead. After the family dog is killed, the Raney's must act quick to stop the couple from becoming the next victims.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Two Teams, One Dream
programme.desc: Fred and Dustin Hurt decide to split up in their hunt for gold in the raging waters of Alaska's Chilkat mountains. While Fred has an ideal spot picked out, Dustin has a big decision to make about his location.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Pound Zone
programme.desc: Dustin's crew finds an ideal claim to mine, but to get down to the gold they have to make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Fred brings in a new miner, only to have his path to bedrock gold is blocked by massive boulders.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: No Guts, No Glory Holes
programme.desc: Fred and his crew return to the glory hole to complete unfinished business. Dustin's crew strikes gold, but are blocked by massive boulders and must engineer an insane system of winches and pulleys to go deeper and get down to bedrock.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Enter the Superclaw
programme.desc: The Dakota boys bank their first gold hauls of the season. Dustin invents a custom super claw to remove massive boulders from his plunge pool. Fred and his crew are confronted by a deadly cable malfunction.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Birthday Gold
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is left shorthanded after an unlikely injury, forcing him to take a calculated risk that nearly turns deadly. After his luck turns, Fred's dives on his 76th birthday to decode a bedrock gold mystery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Gold Cave
programme.desc: Dustin discovers a secret gold cave that could hold millions. Fred and his crew head upstream into a mini-waterfall to find a huge deposit of gold, but first they have to move their 700lb dredge up dangerous rapids.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Nugget Heaven
programme.desc: Dustin Hurt hits bedrock and a pile of nuggets at Rainbow's End. Fred chases the gold upstream into a dangerous new spot, forcing him to rethink his plans.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Nugget Hunter
programme.desc: Rick and his dad fly high into Keno mountains on a treasure hunt. Parker makes a decision about his crew that could determine the fate of his season. Tony checks a spot the old dredges missed and assesses which of his kids might take over one day.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Leave No Gold Behind
programme.desc: Parker questions the ground he's mining and his new foremen. Tony makes a big decision to move the family's entire operation. Rick's mechanic arrives at a critical moment. Then, the Dakota Boys work together in the hunt for gold in Alaska's raging waters.

programme.title: Gold Rush: We're Gonna Need A Bigger Bucket

programme.title: Gold Rush: Monster Red Lives

programme.title: Gold Rush: Motherlode Mountain
programme.desc: Rick must decide whether to mine gold or put his new washplant together. Parker tests his new co-foreman.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Scared Cyst-Less

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Rotten Tomatoes for Bobby

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: BBF vs. Chopped

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Culinary Knockout

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: A Failing Restaurant Is No Laughing Matter
programme.desc: It was no joke in 2014 when Robert Irvine first visited Uncle Andy’s in Portland, Maine, and learned that comic Dennis Fogg and his wife Tina couldn’t even pay themselves. Robert returns to see who stepped up to manage the diner.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Cleaning Up in Mississippi
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine has his work cut out for him when he arrives in Ridgeland, Mississippi. Rossini's Cucina Italiana is filthy, and even worse, owners Lori and Toni seem to have given up. Robert rolls up his sleeves and prepares to get his hands dirty.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Winter Win-derland

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clear the Deck

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Choc-O-Love
programme.desc: Alton Brown and Valerie Bertinelli don't want a rocky road on the way to beating Bobby Flay. They use their chocolate expertise to decide whether acclaimed pastry chef David Lebovitz or chef-of-all-trades Ryan Scott will be able to fight Bobby.

programme.desc: Iron Chef Michael Symon gets some help from the winter solstice and the chillingly hilarious entrepreneur Bethenny Frankel as they try to frost Bobby Flay out of the kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Break a Plate!
programme.desc: Two Italian-cuisine cutthroats, chefs Adam Leonti and Anthony Scolaro, face off for a shot at scuffing up Bobby's record with a loss. Rachael Ray and Damaris Phillips determine who has the sauce to take on the boss.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clear the Deck
programme.desc: It's all hands-on deck when Napa Valley's Daniel Gomez Sanchez competes against Atlanta's Matthew Ridgway. TV host Daphne Oz and Food Network's Eddie Jackson hold nothing back when it comes to slaying Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Choc-O-Love
programme.desc: Alton Brown and Valerie Bertinelli don't want a rocky road on the way to beating Bobby Flay. They use their chocolate expertise to decide whether acclaimed pastry chef David Lebovitz or chef-of-all-trades Ryan Scott will be able to fight Bobby.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: A Failing Restaurant Is No Laughing Matter
programme.desc: It was no joke in 2014 when Robert Irvine first visited Uncle Andy’s in Portland, Maine, and learned that comic Dennis Fogg and his wife Tina couldn’t even pay themselves. Robert returns to see who stepped up to manage the diner.

programme.title: Chopped: There Will Be Bloody Marys
programme.desc: The chefs find a fancy cake and bloody Mary in the first basket. Then in entree round, the three chefs must create dished from ground chicken and seafood paella.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: To the Nth
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is taking some of her favorite recipes over the top! Her mac and cheese stuffed peppers are beer-battered and served with cilantro lime cream and her grilled French toast is finished with grilled strawberries.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like A Pro: Mary Poppins Show
programme.desc: Ina Garten hosts an incredible Mary Poppins reunion sharing cooking secrets and making a British-style Sunday lunch for her friends who produced, directed and acted in the new movie. She shows Emily Blunt her foolproof roasted capon recipe.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Barefoot Bistro
programme.desc: Ina demystifies the French classics plus table settings and the secrets to French pate.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like A Pro: Salads For Four Seasons
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing her pro tips for sensational salads for every season. For an all-in-one spring dinner, her crispy mustard chicken and frisee salad is unbeatable, and tarragon shrimp salad is perfect for an easy and delicious summer lunch.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Easy High Low
programme.desc: Ina Garten loves mixing fancy and casual fare, and she's sharing her secrets to this winning mashup of high and low. She takes everyday potato and celery root puree over the top with truffle butter and serves it with stunning seared scallops.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Chicken
programme.desc: Ina shares her kitchen tips and professional strategies for roasted chicken with radishes, from trussing the bird to carving it. Then, a delicious twist on a classic with chicken and spinach Waldorf salad. Plus, truffled chicken liver mousse.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Seafood
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing all her seafood secrets and pro tips, starting with her recipe for Cioppino, a satisfying one-pot stew with cod, shrimp, scallops and mussels.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Feeding Now, Feeding Later
programme.desc: Ree makes spicy stewed beef, pimento cheese and bacon grits, roasted broccoli salad and a sour cream and parsley dressing.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16 Minute Meals Around the World
programme.desc: Ree goes around the world with 16-minute meals. First stop is India with easy mulligatawny soup for sharing with a friend. Then, for a solo meal, Thai beef with peppers. For dinner it's off to Italy for chicken picatta with lemon parsley noodles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: What's for Breakfast?
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out breakfast places such as a juice bar making bagels from scratch, and a roadhouse mixing Philly food with Southwestern favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Where the Locals Go
programme.desc: Guy Fieri finds local favourites from a third generation cafeteria outside Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Return to Route 66
programme.desc: Guy Fieri takes an eastward tour of Route 66. In Flagstaff, Ariz., a family style restaurant serves scratch-made southwest favourites. In Chicago, a joint has been serving fried chicken on Route 66 since the 30s.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: The Memphis Barbecue Tour
programme.desc: While in Memphis, Guy samples pulled pork sandwiches and barbecue spaghetti.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Moxie Moron
programme.desc: Doug takes on a supervisory role at IPS just to prove to Carrie that he's not content with being a driver for the rest of his life. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to show her bosses that she has moxie by complaining about the company holiday gift.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Major Disturbance
programme.desc: While reading a bedtime story to Deacon's son, Doug changes the ending to make it a little scarier and ends up traumatizing the boy. Meanwhile, Arthur offers himself up as a passenger for hire so people can ride in the carpool lane.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie are not invited to their block party, Doug makes an appearance to prove they are good people, but ends up having to adopt a dog from his neighbour in order to prove it. Meanwhile, Arthur offers to help Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Brace Yourself
programme.desc: When Deacon's son draws a picture of Arthur with crooked teeth, Arthur convinces Doug and Carrie to pay for new braces. However, when Doug attempts to use a similar strategy on Carrie, his plan backfires. Meanwhile, Spence is hired as a cook and maid.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Home Cheapo
programme.desc: When Carrie learns that Deacon and Kelly bought a second home, she convinces Doug that they were able to afford it because they are so cheap.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Offensive Fowl
programme.desc: Carrie is supportive at first of Doug's cleaner approach to life, but quickly grows tired of him trying to force his new beliefs on her and having to eat meat while in private.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tazed in the Lady Nuts
programme.desc: Walden joins his beautiful former employee on a brilliant new project. Meanwhile, Alan advises Jenny to open up to her girlfriend or risk losing her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bite Me, Supreme Court

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Working Late Again
programme.desc: Debra's plan to have Ray work from home backfires in a big way.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Children's Book

programme.title: The Goldbergs: For Your Own Good
programme.desc: Murray is a creature of habit in and around the house. When Beverly changes his favourite easy chair with something new and 'better,' he flips out. He returns the favour by removing the oven in the kitchen to cook with the 'better' microwave.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Scream

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Get Smarter

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Pilot
programme.desc: Christine's 8-year-old son, Ritchie has been accepted into a posh private school where Christine encounters two snooty class moms, Marly and Lindsay, who seem unable to grasp the concept that Christine actually works.

programme.title: Futurama: I, Roommate
programme.desc: Fry is such a slob that he is forced to move out of the Planet Express offices. Fry and Bender attempt to share an apartment, but they become an odd couple.

programme.title: Who Won the Year?

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: Chris and Ruth Miller are frightened to realize their daughter is missing from her bedroom. Although they cannot physically see her, they can hear her cries for help and contact a physicist friend, Bill.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Person or Persons Unknown
programme.desc: After a night of heavy drinking David Gurney awakens to the frightening realization that his wife has no idea who he is. As it turns out, no one has a recollection of who David is and he's slammed in a mental institution.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Gift

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Little People

programme.desc: Returning to New York from a family vacation, the Stone family is separated when some of them are bumped to a later flight and, upon landing, realize that more than five years have passed. They attempt to make sense of this mystifying phenomenon.

programme.title: Manifest: Reentry
programme.desc: The passengers from Flight 828 find themselves under government scrutiny as they struggle to resume their lives. Cal is approached by an obsessive stranger, and Grace and Olive disagree about revealing a devastating secret.

programme.title: Manifest: Turbulence
programme.desc: Ben and Michaela investigate a shocking murder fearing it's connected to Flight 828. Ben struggles to accept the life his wife Grace led in his absence. Olive and Cal realize that being twins after five and a half years apart is harder than they thought.

programme.title: Manifest: Unclaimed Baggage
programme.desc: A mysterious message leads Saanvi to the flight attendant of 828 and to enlist Ben's help in uncovering a secret about the plane. Michaela questions the nature of the callings when one goes horribly awry, leaving Jared to suffer the consequences.

programme.title: Manifest: Connecting Flights
programme.desc: Stories unfold for those left behind in the aftermath of Flight 828's disappearance. In the present, Cal takes Ben on a mysterious adventure that awakens Ben to his son's perplexing abilities. Michaela tries to protect Jared from consequences at work.

programme.title: Manifest: Off Radar
programme.desc: When Cal wakes with a life-threatening fever, Grace worries it's caused by his cancer treatment. Michaela and Ben suspect Cal's condition may be related to a mysterious Flight 828 passenger. Ben and Michaela try to track down the now-missing passenger.

programme.title: Manifest: S.N.A.F.U.
programme.desc: The detained passengers are secretly moved and subjected to painful experimentation. With Cal's health directly linked to them, Ben takes advantage of an old friend to find out where the passengers were taken.

programme.title: Manifest: Point of No Return
programme.desc: Ben and Vance race to locate the missing passengers of Flight 828. Michaela helps a suicidal passenger who believes he is the Angel of Death. Cal goes back to school, navigating his unwanted celebrity and former friends who are all now 16 years old.

programme.title: Manifest: Dead Reckoning

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by friend and investor, Pete de Best. Pete has found a newer construction home in Orange, California that needs cosmetic updating and should prove to be a fast, simple flip.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Doll House Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by a homeowner in Garden Grove, California, about a house they want to quickly sell off the market. The house needs a lot of work, and has strange rooms everywhere that could spell disaster when trying to get permits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a listing for a small home near the beach in Costa Mesa, California. The home is in rough shape and will require a lot of work to renovate, but it's in a desirable and eclectic neighborhood.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Family Friendly Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina receive a call from their long-time friend, Carlos, who is deciding whether to sell his family's home or to try flipping it. It's a tall order for a novice flipper, but with Tarek and Christina's help he may get a higher sale price.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Backyard Staycation
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Riverside, California, with a massive backyard. It has great views and room to create a pool and outdoor living area fit for a five-star resort.

programme.desc: Zak Bagans and his crew head to Upper Fruitland, New Mexico, to help a family who are troubled by the ghost of a faceless young boy. During the intense lockdown inside the Navajo Nation, the guys capture a chair moving on its own.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: The Haunted Museum
programme.desc: Ghost Adventures performs a very special investigation at Zak Bagans' new museum in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Mackay Mansion
programme.desc: The Ghost Adventures crew returns to Virginia City, Nevada, to investigate two properties once owned by the legendary mining tycoon, John Mackay. During the intense lockdown, an unseen force pushes Jay down a flight of stairs.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Apache Junction

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Pasadena Ritual House
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate the Pasadena, California, home of a self-proclaimed Satanist. A seance conducted inside the historic Victorian house reveals an inhuman presence has attached itself to Aaron and is trying to communicate with him.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Screaming Room: Iceberg, Dead Ahead!

programme.title: Jessie: Hoedown Showdown

programme.title: Jessie: Lights, Camera, Distraction!
programme.desc: When Jessie becomes frustrated she can't land any acting gigs, she takes matters into her own hands by participating in a 24 hour film festival. She recruits the kids to help her direct, shoot and edit it, but things get complicated.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Good Grade Hunting
programme.desc: Sydney is baffled when she can't seem to get an A in her poetry class, while Young Max easily gets an A. They find out they had the same poetry teacher.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Hot Spring Friend Machine
programme.desc: Lou helps Gwen build her confidence when she learns that her parents plan to send her to school at the end of the summer. Ava discovers a hot spring at Camp Kikiwaka and enlists Noah to keep it a secret.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Lost at Chel-Sea
programme.desc: The kids accidentally get stuck on a cruise ship alone, while Raven and Chelsea desperately try to catch up with them via Jet Ski.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: The Big Sneak
programme.desc: Blair talks Owen into wearing his dad's favorite Lil Pouty sneakers to school to impress his basketball team. When the shoes, autographed by rapper Lil Pouty himself, get ruined, the siblings go to great lengths to secure a new pair.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Dia De La Dina
programme.desc: 'Dia de la Dina' is coming and Gabby is determined to get her mom a gift that makes up for last year's disaster. Meanwhile, Swift prepares for the end of his assignment on Earth.

programme.desc: Emma rebels with loud music, adult clothes, and a bad attitude. She ends up getting suspended from school and running away. Jessie learns her whereabouts and manages to get Emma to open up about what's bugging her.

programme.desc: When Sydney struggles with ballet, something her mom was great at, she starts to feel like she's losing touch of her mom.

programme.desc: Raven secures influencer Lil Z to emcee her fashion line launch show, but the kids compromise everything when Lil Z finds out they used him to sell tickets.

programme.desc: With his high school reunion fast approaching, Gator worries about impressing his former classmates, so he enlists the help of the Bennett-Blatts to pose as his family.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: My Fair Piggy

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Strangeglove
programme.desc: The staff of Pol Vet Services has one head scratcher after another, from the peculiar to the downright bizarre. With over 19,000 clients, it's only a matter of time before the vets are presented with a unique case that they've never seen before.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cowhide and Seek
programme.desc: Runaways, adventurists, and escape artists, the Pol's have their hands full, between bulls on the loose, and an attempted kitten getaway.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Fix-It-All
programme.desc: Clients take matters into their own hands and our vets have a slew of do-it-yourself doctoring to repair. As if they're not busy enough at the clinic, Dr. Pol, Diane and Charles embark on some ambitious home improvement projects at the lake house.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hook, Feline and Sinker
programme.desc: From gimpy goats to belligerent bulls, families all around are relying on Pol Veterinary Service to take care of their animals this summer.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Knights of the Round Stable
programme.desc: Over at the Michigan Renaissance Festival, Dr. Pol takes a look at the hooves of a limping horse named Maverick, a jousting giant scheduled to compete at that day's tournament.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Planets From Hell
programme.desc: Over the last twenty years we have discovered an extraordinary zoo of planetary nightmares outside our own solar system, all of them truly wild worlds, a collection of monsters. Discussing if all new planets are planets from hell.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strange Lives of Dwarf Planets
programme.desc: Our solar system is home to hundreds of strange, tiny worlds called dwarf planets, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Asteroid Apocalypse: The New Threat
programme.desc: Explore the inner workings of outer space and how the earth was created.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike
programme.desc: Supernovas are the violent death of giant stars, and new discoveries reveal that these cataclysmic events create the elements that are essential to all life in the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Asteroid Apocalypse: The New Threat
programme.desc: Explore the inner workings of outer space and how the earth was created.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Return of the Moon Bugs
programme.desc: Apollo 12 astronauts bring back something alive from the moon and NASA tracks an asteroid heading towards Earth but makes a shocking discovery: it's not an asteroid, but an object that's artificial in nature.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Nazis on the Moon
programme.desc: A Russian probe discovers something has disturbed the lunar soil before the US or the USSR got there.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secret Aliens
programme.desc: An astronomer records an unusual radio signal from beyond our solar system. FBI agents find classified documents at the home of a NASA scientist. When scientists discover strange DNA in the octopus, they examine if their origins could be alien.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon that Disappeared
programme.desc: Recently discovered documents reveal NASA's secret plan B for failure of the first moon landing. A Soyuz capsule carrying NASA astronaut Peggy Whitson back to Earth vanishes without explanation.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto's Evil Twin
programme.desc: After NASA's New Horizons spacecraft flies by Pluto, it encounters a strange alien world that shuts down the probe's computers, and experts investigate if this mysterious object is an alien spacecraft hiding at the edge of our solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did Aliens Nuke Mars?
programme.desc: Experts investigate if an extraterrestrial Armageddon transformed Mars into the wasteland we know today, after a strange discovery by the Curiosity rover suggests the Red Planet was home to an alien nuclear war 300 million years ago.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Black Hole Next Door
programme.desc: When astronomers discover a rogue black hole speeding through the Milky Way, they investigate how much danger this cosmic monster poses to Earth, and what would happen if it ever entered our solar system.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Human Kannonball
programme.desc: With odds stacked against them, a bodyguard, a firefighter and an ultra-fit football coach take on three massive grizzlies in a gauntlet of challenges. As they fight for a place in the finale, each discovers just how badly bears don't like to lose.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Stonehenge
programme.desc: A mysterious Stonehenge-like structure in Russia might have links to the Nazis. Experts uncover clues to a mega-tsunami with the power to devastate the United States. A huge lake appears in the Sahara overnight, and its explanation could be mythical.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: Crime 360: Final Call
programme.desc: Homicide detectives Thompson and Pence are called out to a bloody crime scene. A local tenant knows the victim, but claims to have no knowledge of the murder.

programme.title: Crime 360: Blunt Force Killer
programme.desc: Two men, harassed for being gay, were found fatally beaten in their bedrooms. The search for the killer leads to a nationwide manhunt for his arrest.

programme.desc: A philandering and big-spending wife is suspected of killing her husband to get his money.

programme.desc: Two officers are helped by the K9 Unit to corral a suspect who takes off running after a car chase. Rush and Rutledge struggle to convince a man with heart problems to go to the hospital. A car careens off a bridge and the driver can't be found.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Lost in the Swamp

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Swamp Manhunt
programme.desc: An armed and dangerous fugitive from another parish tries to make his escape in the swamps.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Gator Man's Law
programme.desc: Corporal Storm Fitch finds an abandoned car in the marsh just off an eerie and haunted bayou road.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Poached
programme.desc: Detectives come up with a creative plan to catch two dangerous alligator poachers red-handed.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Death Threat
programme.desc: The warden receives an anonymous letter from an inmate threatening to organize a group to attack correctional officers.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Conspiracy
programme.desc: With inmate drug use at an all-time high, the Squad searches for the source of the drugs that have made their way into the prison.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He's Out There
programme.desc: Florida teen Karen Slattery is enjoying a night babysitting her neighbors' children, until a violent intruder bursts into the home and vanishes with no trace. With the community on edge, police know they don't have much time before he strikes again.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: 40 Years of Winter
programme.desc: After Christmas shopping, 18-year-old Linda Velzy vanishes into upstate New York's frozen landscape. The primary suspect refuses to talk to detectives, so Linda's father hatches a desperate plan. But temperatures are dropping and time is running out.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: A pastor discovers a bartender's strangled corpse in the snow, just days before Christmas. Suspicion turns toward the bartender's best friend, but detectives aren't quite sure.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Empty Chair
programme.desc: The day after a snowstorm, high school freshman Shaun Ouillette vanishes. His mother searches for three desperate weeks. But when an anonymous letter leads detectives into the frozen woods, they make a discovery that will tear the small town apart.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: A pastor discovers a bartender's strangled corpse in the snow, just days before Christmas. Suspicion turns toward the bartender's best friend, but detectives aren't quite sure.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: As He Lay Frozen
programme.desc: On a freezing Minnesota night, a ruthless shooting leaves a young police officer fighting for his life by the roadside. As his wife awaits his fate, a heart-stopping manhunt ensues. As the killers escape, officers don't know who they'll strike next.

programme.title: The Interrogator: The Murders at Immaculate Auto Sales
programme.desc: Three members of a tight-knit family are brutally murdered in broad daylight while working at their family owned car dealership. After an intense four-month investigation, Fil Waters boils it down to a scorned woman and an eyewitness who saw the killer.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Noise in the Night
programme.desc: Sisters Bre and Kayli Lasley have just moved into the perfect apartment in downtown Salt Lake City, unaware that a recent parolee is living close by. That is until one quiet night when suddenly their lives cross paths in an explosive way.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Noise in the Night
programme.desc: Sisters Bre and Kayli Lasley have just moved into the perfect apartment in downtown Salt Lake City, unaware that a recent parolee is living close by. That is until one quiet night when suddenly their lives cross paths in an explosive way.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: A pastor discovers a bartender's strangled corpse in the snow, just days before Christmas. Suspicion turns toward the bartender's best friend, but detectives aren't quite sure.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Rough Diamond
programme.desc: A couple's robbing spree to buy drugs turns into a murder spree when the body count adds up.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: The Dark Krystal
programme.desc: When troubled teen Krystal Hall develops a meth addiction, she teams up with meth maniac Patrick Connelly. The duo can't get enough of each other and soon launch a murderous rampage.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: A Slice of Murder
programme.desc: A homicidal manager with a pizza chain unleashes a reign of terror and murder accompanied by his twisted new girlfriend who entices fresh victims.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Dante's Inferno
programme.desc: Drug dealer Donte Hall and his identical twin Dante are the masterminds of the robbery at a bachelor party where two men were killed. Police struggle to find them before another death results.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Venus Guy Trap
programme.desc: Beautiful nursing student Taiana Matheny falls for rising rap star Terry Sellers. With Taiana as their irresistible bait, their hot and heavy drug-fueled romance turns their romantic getaway into a murderous crime spree.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Wheels of Steel
programme.desc: Two twisted friends will stop at nothing to steal nurse Sandra Stotler's flashy cars. They shoot her and dump the body in a lake, but plan to kill again to get their hands on her second vehicle.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling with Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Man with Two Faces
programme.desc: Bloomington, Illinois Sergeant Jeff Pelo is a respected police officer. At home, he's a model father and husband. So when he's caught trespassing after midnight on a young woman's property, his spotless reputation comes under fire.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fear the Ether Man
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as the Ether Man lurks in the shadows of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Victims can't identify the masked attacker and worse still, it looks like he's expanding his hunting grounds.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: A Darker Shade of Blue
programme.desc: Chaos ensues in Fox Lake, Illinois when an officer is found dead. With a potential cop killer on the loose, the town is on lockdown. But when sordid details of the dead officer's secret life come out, the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Ties That Bind
programme.desc: A teenage romance gets caught in family ties.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death of a Salesman
programme.desc: John Parker marries Judy, a nice girl from the wrong side of the tracks. John uses his wealth and status to keep his new wife happy. But Judy's rumored romantic entanglements with a string of John's employees prove to be too much for John to bear.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Warriors on the Frontlines
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Drew Dix and a small handful of soldiers liberate an entire city from an enemy battalion. Russian soldier Viktor Leonov vanquishes German forces in the Arctic battlegrounds of World War 2.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Soaring to New Heights
programme.desc: Test pilot Joe Kittinger volunteers to be the first man to parachute jump from the edge of space, and Air Force researcher Dr. John Stapp straps himself into rocket sleds to test the limits of human endurance.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: For a Greater Cause
programme.desc: George Rowe is a former criminal who goes undercover to bust a motorcycle gang, and the Masin brothers lead a resistance cell against Communist oppression in Czechoslovakia.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.desc: Nicole's doing a surprise home renovation for one of her carpenters, Bobby, and his family. Bobby and Karen started renovating their house two years ago, but their daughter was diagnosed with cancer and they turned their focus to her.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Surprise for Tessa
programme.desc: Tessa and her family are coming home soon, and Nicole needs to finish their surprise home renovation before they do. She tackles the laundry room and hallway in the back addition of Bobby and Karen's house.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Laverock Hill Estate
programme.desc: The crew heads to Glenside, PA to salvage a huge estate. The sprawling mansion gives the Dawgs a run for their money as they try to save columns, doors, mantles, bathtubs and more. Mike and Tay visit Rural Retreat to find a piece for a coffee table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Alexandria Church
programme.desc: The crew go to salvage a church where they must save everything from contemporary pews to a commercial grade sink. However, the team must get creative as they are met with heights, narrow hallways and perplexing waterlines.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Liberty Trust Building
programme.desc: Robert and the team take on the old Liberty Trust Building in downtown Roanoke, VA. After salvaging a few vintage bathrooms, they remove two stately vault doors. Later, the team heads back to the shop to create a wedding present for Grayson's big day.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Timberville House
programme.desc: The dawgs salvage a 1900s farmhouse in the heart of the Shenandoah Valley. Along with the usual doors and hardware, they find ornate ceiling medallions, a clawfoot tub and pine flooring. A built-in cabinet yields a potential treasure.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Country Store and Gas Station
programme.desc: The crew heads to Grottoes, Virginia, to salvage and demolish an old country store. Using materials from the project, Mike and Robert create a tribute bench for a veterans' retreat.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Taylor Family Farm
programme.desc: Picking through old farm land and former Native American settlement, the crew find several treasures to load up and take back to Roanoke. Mike and Tay build a freight cart couch in the shop and Robert gets excited about a corn sheller.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Cap Centre
programme.desc: The crew take a second stab at the Boulevard at Capital Centre. This time, they bring home finds from a Japanese restaurant, a bank and a spa, including shoji screens and bullet-resistant plexiglass. Back home they complete a build for a dear friend.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Last Trip to Cap Center
programme.desc: The Dawgs focus their attention on the exterior finishes of the Boulevard at the Capital Centre to complete their last round of salvaging in Largo, MD. Later, the team transforms a box of old farm equipment into a one-of-a-kind build.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Liberty Trust Building

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Miami Flip: It's Raining Ants!
programme.desc: Carolina's new flip is on a tight schedule, so she wastes no time getting to work, gutting out bathrooms and ripping up smelly carpet. But just as quickly as work starts, everything comes to halt when an infestation of ants is uncovered.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Cranky Construction
programme.desc: Friends Kim and Marissa jump into their first flip but soon realize that they may not have enough construction experience to complete the project on their own. As renovations go awry, the duo realizes they are in over their heads.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Dancing on the Drop Ceiling
programme.desc: When Daniel accidentally wins a dilapidated house in an auction, he and his pregnant wife Katie must rush to finish the house before their baby's due date. However with multiple delays and a lack of experience, the chances get slimmer as the days go by.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: In the Trenches
programme.desc: A husband-and-wife team goes way over on schedule and budget when permit applications with the city don't go as expected. Finding themselves at a standstill with what work they can accomplish, the wife starts to worry this flip will never end.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Quick Flip or Slow Drip?
programme.desc: A competitive couple's project starts strong but unforeseen plumbing issues lead to a near flood in the basement, causing the panicked couple to question if they can pull through at all.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: A Rotten Flip
programme.desc: A young couple discovers pest damage while flipping a four-bedroom bungalow in the seaside town of Newport, North Carolina. Fixing the rot is a major hit to their budget and adds to their never-ending list of projects.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Besties on a Budget
programme.desc: Two best friends flipping a house in Amherst, NY, struggle to complete renovation projects themselves due to lack of experience. Failed project after failed project leaves one looing to the pros.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Rebuilder's Remorse
programme.desc: A husband recruits the help of his wife to flip their first home in Grand Forks, ND. She loves demo but things get tricky when it comes time for rebuild. He realizes he might not have the best partner to navigate the waters of the rebuild process.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Praying for An Easy Flip
programme.desc: Two pastors at the same church flip a house in Muskegon, MI. One has prior renovation experience and is confident he can lead the charge while the other is hoping to learn new skills along the way.

programme.title: Behind the Build: HGTV Dream Home
programme.desc: Go behind the build to see how the HGTV Dream Home 2020 comes together from the ground up. This spectacular home is designed with outdoor living in mind on Hilton Head Island, South Carolina, in one of the island's most sought after communities.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving More than Logs in Bulls Gap, TN
programme.desc: Mark and the guys go the extra mile to save the antique logs from a Tennessee home in distress. During the job they meet Larry, who grew up in the log cabin with no running water.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Larry Melton's Chance of a Lifetime
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders, after once saving Larry Melton's childhood home, do something they've never done before. They invite Larry to the Boneyard to help restore his family home. Mark also arranges a final surprise with some very special guests.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Honey Hole
programme.desc: Mark needs a lot of inventory in a hurry so he buys three cabins. It's a fast-paced triple takedown full of suspense, strategy and big crashes. The guys are still able to discover family stories that give these logs history and meaning.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bayou Bites
programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gordita, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the jackpot with midway eats, like the onion ring nacho supreme and cosmic funnel cake, at the Pasco County Fair in Florida. Later, he decks the halls and grabs a bite or two at the sights and sounds of Christmas in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Be sure to finish all your veggies because we've got the scoop on the best desserts around. Ted Allen, Alton Brown, Giada De Laurentiis and Bobby Flay are sharing their favorite sinful sweets.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feats Of Meat
programme.desc: Chefs share the most mouth-watering meat dishes they've ever eaten.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Life Changers
programme.desc: We're revealing all the unforgettable dishes that changed our lives.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Pie's the Limit
programme.desc: From savory to sweet and cheesy to meaty, the pie possibilities are endless. Wolfgang Puck picks a perfect fruit and cream pie in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Terrific Italian

programme.desc: Austin can get sweltering hot but they have plenty of delicious options to keep you cool. At Cow Tipping Creamery, Corey Sorensen is making stackers, her layered version of a sundae.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Mornings in Sunny L.A.
programme.desc: Visit some Los Angeles hotspots that are the sweetest places to start the day.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Classic desserts get deliciously updated at three sweet shops across the country. Skull and Cakebones rocks vegan cupcakes in Austin, Texas, with flavors like basil berry, dirty chai and just beet it.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Cute and Sweet
programme.desc: Today we visit three locations that pack big flavors in small servings. First stop is Cake Monkey Bakery in Los Angeles to try some of their mini layer cakes.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Colorado Sweets
programme.desc: Colorado has some amazing sweets. Head to High Point Creamery in Denver from some unusual ice cream flavors like lemon ice pop with raspberry swirl and earl grey tea with shortbread.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Savory Sweets
programme.desc: Sweet and savory flavors are such an irresistible combination. We visit three sweet and savory hot spots including Aiko Pops in Denver, where ice pops come in radical flavors like raspberry and sweet corn.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Lady Liberty Cake
programme.desc: Sugar craft specialist Eloise Durrant receives an order for a four-foot-tall cake replica of the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: The Purr-Fect Birthday Cake

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Must Love Dogs Cake
programme.desc: Eloise Durrant works on an unusual request, a cake that is edible for both humans and dogs.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: An Edible Portrait on a Cake Canvas
programme.desc: Baker Molly Robbins focuses on bringing to life a large cake beach scene complete with jelly sea, crispy marshmallow rocks and dozens of hand-carved sunbathers.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Beer, Bling And Spinning Cakes
programme.desc: A brewery celebration calls for kegs made of cake that actually pour beer, and a huge, edible sombrero is filled with food and flames!

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Magical And Mysterious Cakes
programme.desc: Two edible dragons battle it out across a running stream, plus a sci-fi wedding cake transports the bride and groom to another planet.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Castles, Coral And Camo Cakes
programme.desc: A cake from Down Under brings a mermaid and sea creatures to life, and a baby's gender is revealed with fairy tale castle flair. Plus, a wedding cake captures the couple's love of deer hunting.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Doughnut Dumbbells and a Wine Fountain Cake
programme.desc: A fountain of wine pours from an edible bottle for a vineyard party, and two brothers celebrate their engagements with a towering, colorful elephant cake. Exercise is sweet when the dumbbells look like doughnuts.

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Tagalong Polliwog/ Sparkly Star Switcheroo
programme.desc: Kermit's nephew, Robin, comes to visit and everyone is excited to play with him, but Kermit is very protective. When Rizzo is sad about not making a wish on a shooting star, Summer paints a sparkly star to cheer him up.

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: Rhyme Time
programme.desc: Vampirina has a spell that creates the perfect rhyme.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goofy's Drive-In / The Iron Mouse
programme.desc: Everyone works together to save Goofy's favourite drive-in theater.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Mixed-Up Motor Lab/ Wishy Washy Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey invents a new Motor Lab to add new upgrades to the gang's roadsters. The Happy Helpers offer their services to make Bigby Towers' windows sparkle and shine.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Dinner Thief on the Puppytown Express / O' Brother, Where ARF Thou?
programme.desc: Bob takes the pugs on a dinner train but all the food's gone missing; When ARF's batteries run out, the pugs and pals try to rescue their robo-brother.

programme.title: Vampirina: Face the Music/ Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: Poppy writes a song for the Ghoul Girls to perform in the school talent show; Vee and her friends are invited to a sleepover at the museum hosted by King Pepi.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Monstrous Truck/ Minnie's Vacation Home!
programme.desc: Mickey accidentally turns his roadster into a monster truck! Daisy and Cuckoo Loca worry that Minnie is moving out!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Captain Rolly/ The Coolest Dogs in Town
programme.desc: Bob takes Bingo and Rolly to a 'Captain Dog!' event where the pugs get to be heroes for a day. The pups try to find ways to keep Bob cool on a hot summer day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Close Encounters of a Pug Kind/ History Mystery
programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Meet An Yu
programme.desc: Night Ninja heads to Mystery Mountain to unleash the mountain's magic. The PJ Masks team up with Dragon Girl to stop him.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Supersonic Owlette/ Catboy and the Sticky Splat Slingshot
programme.desc: Romeo sneaks into PJ Masks HQ and discovers its super-secret rocket ship ability. Catboy learns that it’s not about how cool you look saving the day, just so long as you save it.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Summer Penguin, P.I./ You Ought to Be in Pictures
programme.desc: Summer assumes the role of detective when a heated game of checkers turns unpleasant. While on a field trip to a local art museum, Fozzie's lunchbox is stolen by a mischievous monkey and the Muppet Babies must chase him through paintings to get it back.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.desc: It's Gekko's birthday and he's excited for his lizard themed party until Night Ninja steals everything. Luna Girl turns a sleep-walking Cameron into her very own puppet.

programme.desc: Goofy wishes he could be a super-hero so that he can help out his friends.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Mystery
programme.desc: Kansas City Mickey sets out to find an ancient mouse-eared stone monument deep in the Hidden Jungle.

programme.desc: Fozzie's Funny Joke Show gets interrupted after Kermit finds a video game. When a new friend, Carlos the Frog, visits, Fozzie assumes he likes all the same things as Kermit.
