programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Guru Goofy/ Bed, Breakfast and Bungled!
programme.desc: Goofy tries to teach Donald mindfulness in order to relax before the Roadster Games. When Clarabelle assists the Happy Helpers run a bed and breakfast, her eagerness creates more problems.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Lights, Camera! Help!
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Happy Mousekeday
programme.desc: It's Mickey's birthday and the Clubhouse gang has organized fun activities for the big Mousekeday.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy the Homemaker
programme.desc: Goofy along with friends help a baby Red Bird build a birdhouse for him and his family.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Tale
programme.desc: Prince Pluto rescues Princess Bella from the clutches of sneaky Wizard Pete.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Ducks
programme.desc: Donald volunteers to help a group of ducks get to a warm beach for their winter retreat.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy Babysitter
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake's Tick Tock Time Machine accidentally turns Mickey, Minnie, Donald, Daisy and Pluto into toddlers, Goofy steps in to babysit and gets a little help from Mother Goose Clarabelle.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Doctor Daisy, MD
programme.desc: When Donald gets sick, Daisy acts as thought she's his doctor.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Mystery
programme.desc: When Minnie's freshly baked muffins disappear the gang set out to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy in Training
programme.desc: Goofy finishes an obstacle course and gets a shiny medal after learning directional skills.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Playmate
programme.desc: Mickey and pals teach a visitor some new tricks for his debut in Mickey's Circus.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Hi, Jinx!/ Pete's Junkyard Helpers
programme.desc: Emmy Lou meets Jinx the cat and gets the gang to help her find the kitty a new home. The Happy Helpers run Pete's junkyard while he takes his Mama out to lunch for her birthday.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: It's Wiki Wiki Time/ Happy Hula Helpers!
programme.desc: Donald's Hawaiian vacation is interrupted when the rest of the gang arrives for a big relay race. The Happy Helpers are tasked with teaching a hula dance for a birthday celebration.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Hot Dog Daze Afternoon/ Super Sweet Helpers
programme.desc: On Mickey's day off, he continues getting called back to help at the garage. The Happy Helpers look after Mrs. Sweetums' candy store and factory.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: One Unicorny Day!/ The Happy Horse Helpers!
programme.desc: When a horse gets a traffic cone stuck on her head and is sprayed with sparkly paint, the townsfolk think they've seen a real unicorn.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Big Surprise/ Meet the Beagles
programme.desc: Goofy struggles to keep Minnie's surprise for Mickey's birthday a secret. The Happy Helpers are asked to help a band get back together.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Fun-tastical Field Day/ Clarabelle on the Mooo-ve!
programme.desc: During Fun-tastical Field Day, Donald tries to do all the competitions himself. The girls reunite for a race so that Clarabelle can try to become a Roadsterette!

programme.title: The Rocketeer: Skyway Robbery / A Doggone Adventure
programme.desc: Sylvester Slapdash, disguised as the "Costumed Bandit," plots to rob the Bulldog Café. Butch must rescue his new friend, Honey, the golden doodle.

programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Breakout
programme.desc: Kaz and Norath try to help their friends while being pursued by a deadly bounty hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Surprise!/ Amore Motore
Mickey Mouse Shorts: A Flower for Minnie/ Mickey Monkey/ Al Rojo Vivo
Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Top Wing/ Fried Mean Tomatoes
programme.desc: Mavis and Quasimodo host some cooking classes at the hotel, but things don't go quiet as planned. Wendy wants to join the aerial security team, the Night Warts, but tensions arise when Mavis makes the team instead.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Married to the Blob
programme.desc: Wendy's dad and Pedro's mom are getting married and Mavis has promised Hotel Transylvania will throw them the best wedding ever.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Rivalry Weak
programme.desc: Honey Lemon secretly takes art classes at SFIT’s rival, SFAI, and soon finds herself caught in the middle of both schools’ annual Rivalry Week.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Totally Awesome Battle Jack
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Jimmy Steals the Show
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Max
programme.desc: Hiro invents a tiny robot, Mini-Max, to supervise and be a sidekick to Fred while the rest of the team is in class.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal

programme.title: The Making of: Tolkien
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at how a movie or show is made.

programme.title: Movie: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: As the biggest, most intense winter storm in modern history barrels down on New York City, a climatologist who has tried to warn the world of the potential for such a storm must save his son and his son's girlfriend, who are trapped in the ensuing chaos.

programme.title: Movie: Breakthrough
programme.desc: After falling through the ice on a frozen lake, a boy is without a pulse for nearly 45 minutes, but with the help of doctors he makes a miraculous recovery that strengthens his and his family's faith.

programme.title: Movie: Les Misérables
programme.desc: In France during the 19th century, a man who has been searched for by the police for breaking his parole tries to make things right. He decides to take care of the daughter of a factory worker, not realizing the decision will change their lives.

programme.title: Movie: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between two worlds, Hellboy, a half-man, half-demon must defeat an ancient sorceress.

programme.title: Movie: Alfie
programme.desc: A womanizing British limo driver in Manhattan learns that his devil-may-care attitude has become a poor substitute for true love and lasting friendship.

programme.title: Movie: Breakthrough
programme.desc: After falling through the ice on a frozen lake, a boy is without a pulse for nearly 45 minutes, but with the help of doctors he makes a miraculous recovery that strengthens his and his family's faith.

programme.title: Movie: Bringing Down the House
programme.desc: A lonely man meets a woman on the Internet who happens to be in prison. When she breaks out to be with him, she proceeds to wreak havoc on his middle-class life.

programme.title: Movie: King Arthur
programme.desc: A demystified version of the legend of King Arthur and the Knights of the Round Table.

programme.title: Movie: Bicentennial Man
programme.desc: A robot tries to become human when he realizes that he has emotions and creative thoughts.

programme.title: The Making of: The Aftermath
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at how a movie or show is made.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: Catfish
programme.desc: A filmmaker follows the life of his brother, a New York photographer, and becomes intertwined in an online intrigue of love and deception.

programme.title: Movie: Boy Erased
programme.desc: After a teen is outed against his will to his devout parents, he's sent to a gay conversion therapy program. As he increasingly butts heads with the head therapist, his parents struggle to reconcile their faith and love for their son with his sexuality.

programme.title: Movie: Unknown
programme.desc: After awakening from a coma, a man discovers that his identity has been stolen.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Ever Forgive Me?
programme.desc: After her style of writing falls out of favour, a biographer finds herself broke and out of work. She beings forging letters by famous people and selling them, but when potential buyers begin to get suspicious she turns to stealing actual letters.

programme.title: Movie: The Apollo
programme.desc: Learn the history of Harlem's famous Apollo Theater, New York City.

programme.title: Movie: The Recruit
programme.desc: A mentor asks a talented young CIA trainee to help find a mole inside the agency.

programme.title: Movie: The Dilemma
programme.desc: After seeing his best friend's wife on a date with another man, Ronny investigates and must decide whether or not to tell his friend.

programme.title: Movie: Moulin Rouge!
programme.desc: A popular courtesan working at the Moulin Rouge falls in love with a poet in 1899 Paris.

programme.title: Movie: American Son
programme.desc: A young Marine on a four-day leave for Thanksgiving is forced to deal with adulthood and his not so pleasant home life.

programme.title: Movie: Madison
programme.desc: A former hydroplane racer resolves to make sure the annual regatta stays in town.

programme.title: Movie: Evening
programme.desc: Two daughters gather at their mother's deathbed, only to discover that their mother lived another life long ago. With this understanding of her, they face their loss and struggle for happiness.

programme.title: Movie: The Object of My Affection
programme.desc: A young woman falls hopelessly in love with her best friend, who is also her gay roommate.

programme.title: Movie: The Manchurian Candidate
programme.desc: An officer tries to unravel the mystery behind an attack on his unit during the Gulf War. He discovers a war hero, who is now on the ballot for vice president, may not be what he seems.

programme.title: Movie: The Favourite
programme.desc: Queen Anne of Great Britain is a woman of ill health, and her close friend Lady Sarah handles the day-to-day work of governing, but when Sarah's cousin arrives at court it sparks a bitter rivalry between them over who is the Queen's favourite.

programme.title: Movie: Getaway
programme.desc: When his wife gets kidnapped, an ex-racecar driver steals a car and drags the car's owner into a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Movie: Spotlight
programme.desc: The Boston Globe's 'Spotlight' team delves into allegations of sexual abuse perpetrated by Catholic priests in their own city.

programme.title: Movie: Girl, Interrupted
programme.desc: After attempting suicide, Susanna is encouraged to check into Claymoore, a suburban mental hospital that's more like a country club than an asylum. At first angry and anti-social, she eventually concentrates on making a conscious effort to rehabilitate.

programme.title: Shameless: Debbie Might Be a Prostitute
programme.desc: Debbie weighs the pros and cons of a new career path. Frank uncovers the truth about Fay's living situation. A miscommunication between Ian and Mickey has disastrous consequences and Lip and Tami disagree over who should be taking care of Fred.

programme.title: Movie: Green Book
programme.desc: An acclaimed black pianist hires a white man to be his driver and bodyguard for his tour of the Jim Crow south, and as they set out for the long trip they realize that they have nothing in common, but as the trip goes on they forge a strong bond.

programme.title: The L Word: Generation Q: LA Times
programme.desc: Dani is forced to get involved in Bette's personal life, Shane grapples with a big decision, Alice is profiled by a newspaper, Sophie worries that Dani is pulling back and Finley struggles with her growing feelings for Rebecca.

programme.title: Work In Progress: 161, 153, 137, 122, 106, 105, 104, 102 (We're Still Counting Almonds)
programme.desc: Abby navigates public restrooms as a gender non-conforming queer dyke with OCD and pinballs against a cross section of humanity and perspectives at a Dolly Parton concert.

programme.title: Ray Donovan: The Transfer Agent
programme.desc: Mickey finally learns the truth about the botched heist, and he's out to get his fair share of the money. Ray reflects on his early memories of Jim Sullivan while he and Molly track down Sandy and Mickey by any means necessary. The police question Smitty.

programme.title: Movie: Drive Angry
programme.desc: A father escapes from hell to hunt down the man who killed his daughter and abducted his granddaughter.

programme.title: Quiet Storm: The Ron Artest Story
programme.desc: In professional sports, no American athlete has ever made a comeback from a mental health disorder until Ron Artest. One of the most divisive and misunderstood athletes to hit the court, this documentary highlights the man now known as Metta World Peace.

programme.title: The Making of: 1917
programme.desc: Filmmaker Sam Mendes and cinematographer Roger Deakins, along with their cast and fellow filmmakers, discuss the extraordinary undertaking of creating the epic '1917,' about WWI soldiers that was filmed in real time, as a continuous shot.

programme.title: Movie: Beowulf
programme.desc: A fabled warrior must save a kingdom that is being terrorized by a monster and its mother.

programme.title: Movie: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: Following his master's death, a squire enters a jousting competition in medieval England.

programme.title: Movie: The Impossible
programme.desc: A family finds themselves among thousands of victims and strangers in a natural catastrophe.

programme.title: Movie: Tammy and the T-Rex
programme.desc: When a jock is killed by a rival, a doctor transplants his brain into a robotic dinosaur.

programme.title: Movie: Timeline
programme.desc: Students become trapped in 14th-century France when they try to retrieve their professor.

programme.title: Movie: Hulk
programme.desc: A geneticist's experimental accident curses him with the tendency to become a powerful giant green brute under emotional stress.

programme.title: Movie: The Front Runner
programme.desc: Popular and charismatic Senator Gary Hart is the clear frontrunner in the 1988 Democratic primary, but when allegations of an affair surface a media frenzy ensues, while his stalwart campaign manager tries to keep the campaign from going off the rails.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The Plaintiff was friends with the Defendant for ten years, but claims when she was drunk, she assaulted her with a bottle and crashed her car.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include 'A Bad Bob', 'Taking Way Too Long' and 'Roughing Up A Roommate.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Have Several Seats/ What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Woman sues for cost of broken tablet; former friend sues over trip costs.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: The plaintiff is seeking $5000 for damages to his car from an alleged hit and run; the defendant says she was struck by a deer and left the scene in fear. A woman hired an acquaintance to repair her house, but the house was left in shambles.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Must Clear My Name of This Sex Crime
programme.desc: Anthony was arrested for rape and other charges, and is now a registered sex offender. He wants to take a test to clear his name. Plus, Christina was charged with molestation of the elderly, and now she wants to clear her name.

programme.title: Maury: The DNA Test Will Prove You Have Eight Children!
programme.desc: Alyssa cheated on Brandon around the time she got pregnant, and needs a paternity test. Demiril is livid that Ronyell is denying her youngest three children. Word's out that Gary has seven kids with seven women, and now he's denying Ashley's son.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Guests appear to expose their outrageous stories, from kinky relationships to crazy obsessions.

programme.title: Movie: Notting Hill
programme.desc: The press tests the relationship between a Hollywood star and a London shopkeeper.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Keep a Secret?
programme.desc: A woman on a flight, thinking the plane is about to crash, discloses all her secrets to a seeming stranger, then later finds out the man is actually the CEO of the company she is working for.

programme.title: Movie: An Ideal Husband
programme.desc: A husband's seemingly perfect life is threatened by evidence of a past misdeed.

programme.title: Movie: Cedar Rapids
programme.desc: A man leaves his sleepy town for the first time in 34 years to represent his insurance company at a convention.

programme.title: Movie: Reality Bites
programme.desc: Four friends face the promise and pitfalls of life in the 1990s when they share a house.

programme.title: Movie: Shazam!
programme.desc: A boy has the power to turn into a grown-up superhero.

programme.title: Movie: A Good Woman
programme.desc: In the '30s, a Manhattan socialite travels to the Amalfi Coast to escape debts and her past indiscretions. There she meets a man who tries to help her back into high society.

programme.title: Movie: Touch of Pink
programme.desc: A gay Canadian in London has his perfect life turned upside down by his mother's visit. He must chose between his fantasy life with Cary and real life pleasures.

programme.title: Movie: American Splendor
programme.desc: A comic book writer meets a woman and they enjoy a depressive relationship together.

programme.title: Movie: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: After his son witnesses a murder, an FBI agent goes undercover at an all-girl's school to find the murderer.

programme.title: Movie: Down to You
programme.desc: A man finds the girl of his dreams only to discover that she is not ready for commitment.

programme.title: Movie: Gulliver's Travels
programme.desc: A travel writer becomes shipwrecked on an island where he is much taller than the tiny citizens that inhabit it.

programme.title: Movie: The Rundown
programme.desc: A bounty hunter teams up with a mob boss's son in order to retrieve a legendary artifact.

programme.title: Movie: Another Stakeout
programme.desc: Partners on a stakeout are assigned to watch over a reluctant witness against the mob.
